name: Orama MCP (repo knowledge search)
description: Installs a stdio MCP server that indexes Markdown, JSONL, and PDF files in the workspace with Orama (in-memory hybrid BM25 + vector search) and exposes them to MCP clients such as Claude Code.

version.description: Git ref (branch, tag, or commit) of quebi-gmbh/mcp-features to build packages/orama-mcp from. 'latest' resolves to 'main'.

globs.description: Comma-separated globs of files to index.

ocr.description: Enable OCR fallback for scanned/image-only PDFs (pages with no text layer). Installs tesseract.js and passes --ocr to the server. Born-digital PDFs never need this.

autoRegister.description: Merge an entry into the workspace .mcp.json so MCP clients auto-discover the server. Set false if claude-manager (or another tool) owns .mcp.json.
